name: turbo
description: Turborepo is a high-performance build system for JavaScript and TypeScript codebases

subcommands.name: bin
subcommands.description: Get the path to the turbo binary

subcommands.name: link
subcommands.description: Link your local directory to a Vercel organization and enable remote caching

name: --no-gitignore
options.description: Do not create or modify .gitignore

name: --sso-team
options.description: Attempt to authenticate to the specified team using SSO

subcommands.name: prune
subcommands.description: Prepare a subset of your monorepo

name: --scope
options.description: Specify package to act as entry point for pruned monorepo

name: --docker
options.description: Output pruned workspace into 'fill' and 'json' directories optimized for Docker layer caching

subcommands.name: unlink
subcommands.description: Unlink the current directory from your Vercel organization and disable remote caching

name: --scope
options.description: Specify packages to act as entry points for task execution

name: --cache-dir
options.description: Specify local filesystem cache directory

name: --concurrency
options.description: Limit the concurrency of task execution (use `1` for serial)

name: --continue
options.description: Continue execution even if a task exits with an error

name: --force
options.description: Ignore the existing cache

name: --graph
options.description: Generate a Dot graph of the task execution

name: --global-deps
options.description: Specify glob of global filesystem dependencies to be hashed (useful for .env and files in the root directory)

name: --since
options.description: Limit/set scope to changed packages since a mergebase

name: --team
options.description: The slug of a turborepo.com team

name: --token
options.description: A turborepo.com access token

name: --ignore
options.description: Files to ignore when calculating changed files (supports globs)

name: --profile
options.description: File to write turbo's performance profile into

name: --parallel
options.description: Execute all tasks in parallel

name: --include-dependencies
options.description: Include the dependencies of tasks in execution

name: --no-deps
options.description: Exclude dependent task consumers from execution

name: --no-cache
options.description: Avoid saving task results to the cache (useful for development/watch tasks)

suggestions.name: new-only
suggestions.description: Only new output with hashes for cached tasks

name: --dry
--dry-run
options.description: List the packages in scope and the tasks that would be run

script: until [[ ( -f turbo.json || $PWD = '/' ) ]]; do cd ..; done; cat turbo.json
generators.js_source: e=>{let t;try{t=JSON.parse(e)}catch(i){return console.error(i),[]}return Object.entries(t.pipeline).map(([i,o])=>{let a=[];return"dependsOn"in o&&a.push(`depends on ${o.dependsOn.map(s=>`'${s}'`).join(", ")}`),"outputs"in o&&a.push(`outputs ${o.outputs.map(s=>`'${s}'`).join(", ")}`),{name:i,description:a.length>0?"Task: "+a.join(", "):"Task",icon:ne}})}

name: --version
options.description: Print the version

name: --help
options.description: Print a help message
